comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌬 Which place surprised you the most—Ulaanbaatar, Yakutsk, Murmansk, or Oymyakon? Tell us why in the comments.
🌏 Drop a pin from where you’re watching. It’s always fascinating to see how far this journey reaches across the world.
❄ If this story changed the way you see “cold,” stay with us. Subscribe and share this video so we can keep bringing more extraordinary corners of Earth to light.
